description: Sending in a request re: IRIS Front-End Read-Only access for Richard Carlson's team (as well as setting up some basic training on IRIS). Requesting after talking with Melissa Ayo; Christine Hoppe, to document where we last left off for everyone. Basically, just making sure that the info is somewhere that can be referenced for you guys. The Goal of the access is to assist in our back-end IRIS work: we have some processes that would benefit from getting a look at the front, relative to the back end. Our team specifically wants Read-Only access.  When we last left off, some customer service roles in IRIS were identified as a possible fit. A custom role was discussed, but tabled for later conversations after the busy season, etc.  One team member has some IRIS access, and shared his IRIS info w/ Melissa to double check if any of those would work for the Read-Only role.
short_description: IRIS Front-End Read-Only access for Richard Carlson's team
